note: FEDDA original AI personas — each is a fixed LoRA blend + locked face prompt (nobody real). Consistent by construction: change only outfit/scene. All validated clearly-adult.

personas.name: Emma
personas.face_prompt: 1girl, solo, 26yo adult woman, warm friendly smile, long golden blonde hair, bright blue eyes, sun-kissed skin, freckles, defined cheekbones
personas.prompt_suffix: natural glam makeup, casual chic top, warm soft daylight, photorealistic, natural skin texture, candid iphone selfie, a portrait photo
personas.usage: Full prompt = face_prompt + ', ' + <outfit/scene words> + ', ' + prompt_suffix. Keep loras+strengths+face_prompt fixed; change only outfit/scene for a consistent face.
